WITH web_sales_agg AS (
    SELECT 
        ws_bill_customer_sk AS customer_sk,
        SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS web_sales
    FROM web_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_month_seq BETWEEN 1176 AND 1176
    GROUP BY ws_bill_customer_sk
),
store_sales_agg AS (
    SELECT 
        ss_customer_sk AS customer_sk,
        SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS store_sales
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_month_seq BETWEEN 1176 AND...

SELECT 
    c_customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name,
    SUM(CASE WHEN ws.ws_web_page_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ws.ws_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) / 
    NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN ss.ss_store_sk IS NOT NULL THEN ss.ss_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END), 0) AS web_to_store_ratio
FROM customer c
LEFT JOIN web_sales ws ON c.c_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
LEFT JOIN store_sales ss ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk
LEFT JOIN date_dim d ON (ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk OR ss.s...

SELECT 
    c.c_customer_sk,
    c.c_customer_id,
    c.c_first_name,
    c.c_last_name,
    COALESCE(SUM(ws.ws_ext_sales_price), 0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price), 0), 0) AS web_to_store_ratio
FROM customer c
LEFT JOIN web_sales ws 
    ON c.c_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk 
    AND ws.ws_sold_date_sk IS NOT NULL

    ON c.c_customer_sk = ss.ss_customer_sk 
    AND ss.ss_sold_date_sk IS NOT NULL
